{"code":"(def issues (linear__list_issues {:state "in_progress"}))
(def by-assignee (group-by :assignee issues))
(def counts (map (fn [[assignee iss]] {:assignee assignee :count (count iss)}) by-assignee))
(apply max-key :count counts)"}
